commented_code:
#include <stddef.h>
 
+#if defined __ANDROID__ || defined __linux__
+#include <sched.h>
+#else
+namespace ncnn {
+// cpu_set_t definition
+#define CPU_SETSIZE 1024
+#define __NCPUBITS  (8 * sizeof(unsigned long))
+
+typedef struct
+{
+    unsigned long __bits[CPU_SETSIZE / __NCPUBITS];
+} cpu_set_t;
+
+#define CPU_SET(cpu, cpusetp) \
+    ((cpusetp)->__bits[(cpu) / __NCPUBITS] |= (1UL << ((cpu) % __NCPUBITS)))
+
+#define CPU_ZERO(cpusetp) \
+    memset((cpusetp), 0, sizeof(cpu_set_t))
+
+#define CPU_CLR(cpu, cpusetp) \
+    ((cpusetp)->__bits[(cpu) / __NCPUBITS] &= (!(1UL << ((cpu) % __NCPUBITS))))
+
+#define CPU_ISSET(cpu, cpusetp) \
+    ((cpusetp)->__bits[(cpu) / __NCPUBITS] & (1UL << ((cpu) % __NCPUBITS)))
+
+} // namespace ncnn
+#endif
+

discussion_comments.comment_body:
Linux 因为是纯C的项目，没有办法才 CPU_SET CPU_ZERO 这样
ncnn 做个 class CpuSet

discussion_comments.comment_body:
你是说：
```
class CpuSet {
#if android or linux
调用系统的 cpu_set_t 相关的 CPU_SET 等
#else
糙自己的 cpu_set_t
#endif
};
```
对外提供不区分平台的接口？
The global affinity masks are always defined, return ```const CpuSet&```

imdecode and imencode like how opencv highgui module says
simpleocv aims to emulate the exact opencv api, so 3rd software could use simpleocv instead of opencv without any code changes.

all functions shall be guarded extern "C"
in declarations and definitions

refer simpleomp as an example

```
#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif
```


```
#ifdef __cplusplus
} // extern "C"
#endif
```

commented_code:
namespace ncnn {
 
 // instance
+
+// Create VkInstance and initialize some objects that need to be calculated by GPU
+// Creates a VkInstance object, Checks the extended attributes supported by the Vulkan instance concerned,
+// Initializes, and creates Vulkan validation layers (if ENABLE_VALIDATION_LAYER is enabled), 
+// Iterates over all supported physical devices, etc.
 NCNN_EXPORT int create_gpu_instance();
+
+// Get global VkInstance variable
+// Must be called after create_gpu_instance() and before destroy_gpu_instance()
+NCNN_EXPORT VkInstance get_gpu_instance();
+
+// Destroy VkInstance object and free the memory of the associated object
+// Usually called in the destructor of the main program exit
 NCNN_EXPORT void destroy_gpu_instance();
 
+class __ncnn_vulkan_instance_holder
